seo.title: AI Citation Audit - Content Cucumber
seo.meta_description: Find out if AI assistants recommend you or your competitors. We test your brand across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and more.

data.title:
AI Citation Audit
Who Does AI Recommend?
paragraphs: We test your brand across every major AI platform. See exactly where you show up, where you don't, and where your competitors appear instead.

data.title: What We Test
data.subtitle: A systematic audit of your brand's visibility across AI search platforms.

items.title: ChatGPT
items.text: Test how ChatGPT describes your brand, recommends your products, and answers questions about your industry. Compare against competitors.

items.title: Perplexity
items.text: Check which sources Perplexity cites for queries in your space. See if your content is being referenced or if competitors dominate.

items.title: Google AI Overviews
items.text: Analyze which content Google's AI summarizes at the top of search results for your target keywords. Check if you're included or bypassed.

items.title: Ongoing Monitoring
items.text: AI models update regularly. We track your visibility over time so you can measure the impact of optimization and catch drops early.

data.title: How the AI Citation Audit Works

steps.title: Define Queries
steps.text: We identify the questions your customers ask AI. Industry-specific queries, product comparisons, and recommendation requests that matter to your business.

steps.title: Test Across Platforms
steps.text: Run every query across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude. Document who gets mentioned, cited, and recommended.

steps.title: Competitor Comparison
steps.text: Map your visibility against your top competitors. See who AI recommends for each query type and where you have gaps.

steps.title: Actionable Report
steps.text: Prioritized recommendations for improving your AI visibility. Specific content changes, schema additions, and structural improvements ranked by impact.

items.question: Can't I just test this myself?
items.answer: You can test a few queries manually. But a proper audit tests dozens of queries across multiple platforms, documents competitor mentions, and identifies patterns. We also know what signals AI uses to choose sources, so our recommendations are targeted.

items.question: How often should I run an AI citation audit?
items.answer: We recommend quarterly audits. AI models update their knowledge regularly, and your competitive landscape changes. Ongoing monitoring between audits catches sudden drops.

items.question: What if AI doesn't mention my brand at all?
items.answer: That's common and it's exactly why we offer this service. The audit identifies why AI doesn't know about you (missing structured data, low brand mentions, content not formatted for citation) and gives you the roadmap to fix it.

data.title: Is AI Recommending You?
data.text: Find out in one audit. See exactly where you show up in AI search and where your competitors appear instead.
